# Shlok Shah

> Personal website of Shlok Shah, a computer scientist and AI researcher. It contains his background, research, public profiles, and writing.

## About

- [About](https://shahshlok.com/#about): Education, research interests, and FAA Private Pilot License.
- [Public profiles](https://shahshlok.com/): GitHub, LinkedIn, and email links.

## Research

- [What I'm researching](https://shahshlok.com/#research): Accepted papers on whether AI systems understand individual students and how an instructor-facing tool can show uncertainty.
- Paper and artifact links currently point to temporary placeholders and are not authoritative sources yet.

## Writing

- [Blog](https://shahshlok.com/blog/): Notes on AI research, building software, and ideas in progress.

## Notes for agents

- Draft blog pages are visibly labelled as drafts and should not be treated as finished publications.
- The ORCID profile is intentionally not listed on this site yet.
